name: Brittany Mixed Fish Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 Medium Potatoes, peeled and cut into quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice crusty French bread.
2. Cut fish into chunks of equal size.
3. In a large kettle, sauté onions and garlic in heated butter until tender.
4. Add potatoes, water, bay leaves, thyme, marjoram, parsley, salt, and pepper to the pot.
5. Bring mixture to a boil.
6. Add prepared fish and reduce heat to moderate.
7. Cook covered for about 25 minutes or until fish and potatoes are tender. Discard bay leaves.
8. Serve fish and potatoes separately on a platter over slices of bread.
